title: LOWENDCRAFT
description: Lightweight Minecraft 1.21.5 modpack for low-end PCs — adds animations, new structures, challenges, animals, skills, and constant updates with fresh content.
body:
![S](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c5a5c325a9827951def87169c69b3ea197c6f08e.png) ![M](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1922aff0e21bfeb3b5ee2aab506750f967180cfe.png) **** ### VIEW 🖼️ ![S](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5d23bb1c41d13e516f0cfa064a13386d86d7a99e_0.webp) ![A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2bf79e195e88e909a03af06204aafc7f57f5f1e9_0.webp) ![A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/77b9103cb42efc8a0624fe2403c1241175634ebd_0.webp) ### ITEMS ⚔️ ![A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4a725caa2f2b2278e1498795a6bb3fa20324e4e8_0.webp) !['](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48a4b87a4584448403a8e54b5720c142a75036c1_0.webp) ### MORE ACHIVERMENT AND MORE 🌟 ![A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a6543266f57d8d63b6e32f2bb3fa5d616fbda53c.png) ### SKILLS TREE 🎨 ![A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abe74fffcc851e2e4810a572be3ff1133b45d2b6_0.webp) ![A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/337f9365172b1f60346efdadeec5492d8bca0f38_0.webp) ### REI MOD 🪗 ![A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eba8b621f74ba41d185fc60da31a9fc53421f8d1_0.webp) ### FANCY MENU MOD 🎲 This is just an example, you can install it yourself ![F](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce99dfc6377a26650bb34d4522aec55abac0d039.jpeg) ### MENU ABOUT MODS 🤖 ![A](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/50afbaa6eee6121184e13b044c61a0a49b6ec5e7_0.webp) **** The wildlife has been enriched with a diverse variety of animals — from peaceful creatures that bring life to your surroundings, to dangerous predators that demand caution. Unlock and master a range of special skills and abilities, giving you new ways to explore, fight, and build. Whether you’re constructing an elaborate base, exploring hidden ruins, or simply enjoying the world’s beauty, this modpack ensures that every play session feels fresh and rewarding. But the journey doesn’t end here. With regular updates planned, you can expect even more animals, mobs, structures, biomes, and gameplay mechanics to keep your adventure exciting for months to come. No matter if you’re a builder, explorer, or survivalist, this modpack offers endless possibilities — all in a performance-friendly package that runs like a dream. Your world is waiting. Are you ready to begin the adventure? # Q&A ### How to use this modpack?
Show More Download this `.mcpack` file and then go to [this website ](https://fabulously-optimized.github.io/mrpack-to-zip/) to convert it into a `.zip` file. After that, copy all the mods and resource packs into your game folder. Make sure you are using the correct Minecraft version, and check if you need to allocate more RAM for smoother gameplay.
### Oh no, it crashes!
Show More - Check your Minecraft version - Try allocating more RAM - Read the crash report for details If it keeps happening, feel free to **contact me**.
### I have new ideas
Show More If you have suggestions or want new updates, feel free to share your ideas with me.
# Note ### Delete some of these mods if they bother you: ### [Paper doll](https://modrinth.com/mod/paperdoll) [Mining Quakes](https://modrinth.com/mod/mining-quakes) [Inventory HUD+](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/inventory-hud-forge) # What is in new future? This is a new Minecraft version, so there aren’t many bosses or quests yet However, I will keep updating the modpack and add more content in the future ## ANYWAYS: IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTION, DM ME ON DISCORD OR MY GMAIL: GMAIL: ngosynhathoa5@gmail.com SUPPORT ME
